mapper.insert: INSERT INTO activity_signups (activity_id, user_id, name, phone) VALUES (#{activityId}, #{userId}, #{name}, #{phone})
mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.activity_id, s.user_id, s.name, s.phone, COALESCE(u.nickname, '') AS nickname, COALESCE(u.avatar, '') AS avatar FROM activity_signups s LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = s.user_id WHERE s.activity_id = #{activityId} ORDER BY s.id
SELECT * FROM activity_signups WHERE activity_id = #{activityId} AND user_id = #{userId}
